overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban commercial district in a video game environment. The camera moves along wet sidewalks past neon-lit liquor stores and taco shops, with occasional vehicles passing by on the glistening streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked commercial district that transitions from neon-lit storefronts to a raised urban plaza and back down to a residential intersection. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk past a liquor store with glowing purple neon signage, where the glistening pavement reflects the surrounding lights and distant palm trees. As the camera continues forward, a black sedan drives past on the road toward a gas station and upcoming traffic lights, before the path shifts upward as it ascends concrete stairs into a raised plaza filled with landscaped planters. The scene then curves around these green spaces toward a brightly lit taco shop with a blue facade and red trim, standing out against the dark, rainy night. Finally, the camera descends back to the street level, proceeding along the sidewalk toward a crosswalk and an intersection lined with a mix of residential and commercial buildings.
